top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 124, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen)'s mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 124 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen)'s demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
124 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen). Train it until it feels boring.
Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen)'s mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 124 miles.
At Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen), surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen)'s mixed terrain actually does to you.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 124 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.

race_overlay.heat: May in Funen Island, Denmark can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen). Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Fyn Rundt (Tour of Funen)’s 124 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Endurance to prepare you for 124 miles of mixed terrain in Funen Island, Denmark.
